response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced generalist (nearly two decades across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems) whose current role includes MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling — a direct hit on the role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI-specific experience appears to span roughly one year; there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or Python work, which are core to this position. He could be worth a conversation for his engineering depth and customer-facing teaching background, but he does not meet the stated AI experience bar.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure work in current staff-level role
19 years of full-stack engineering across TypeScript/Node.js, cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and low-latency systems
Strong communication and mentoring record via workshops, courses, and conference talks — suits customer-facing discovery work
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/GenAI experience versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or observability experience
Python absent from skills and work history despite being a primary required language
